issues.sample: THE 2018 TOYOTA TACOMA HAS A PRE-COLLISION SYSTEM THAT DOES NOTHING MORE THAN BEEP LOUDLY AT THE DRIVER WHEN IT "THINKS" I NEED TO BRAKE.  IT IS OVERLY SENSITIVE AND SERVES AS A DANGEROUS DISTRACTION WHENEVER I AM IN HEAVY TRAFFIC.  AS AN EXAMPLE, ON TIGHT CITY ROADS WITH CARS PA

narrative.headline: 2018 Toyota Tacoma: brakes lead the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 196 complaints with NHTSA. Service brakes are the most reported area at 23%, followed by the fuel/propulsion system (21%) and the power train (15%). No fires and no deaths are reported in the top areas. The brakes are the only area tied to crashes (5) and an injury (1), so they are worth a careful look on a test drive.

issues.sample: THE 2018 TOYOTA TACOMA HAS A PRE-COLLISION SYSTEM THAT DOES NOTHING MORE THAN BEEP LOUDLY AT THE DRIVER WHEN IT "THINKS" I NEED TO BRAKE.  IT IS OVERLY SENSITIVE AND SERVES AS A DANGEROUS DISTRACTION WHENEVER I AM IN HEAVY TRAFFIC.  AS AN EXAMPLE, ON TIGHT CITY ROADS WITH CARS PA
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: The most reported area and the most serious by outcome: 46 reports (23%), tied to 5 crashes and 1 injury, with no fires. Test the brakes thoroughly.

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 41 reports (21%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Owners describe rough running and stalling.

issues.sample: BOUGHT TRUCK BRAND NEW. WITHIN A COUPLES OF WEEKS NOTICED RANDOM SHUDDERING VIBRATION WHEN DRIVING THE VEHICLE NOT AROUND 35-45 MPH. TOOK IT TO TOYOTA. THEY STATED THEY COULD NOT IMITATE THE ISSUE. SHUDDERING IS WORSE AND CONSISTENT AROUND 35-50 MPH. CURRENTLY AROUND 2000 MILES O
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 29 reports (15%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Owners describe a shudder or vibration around 35-50 mph.

issues.sample: AROUND 12:30PM ON 6/28 MY TOYOTA TACOMA 2018 VIN# [XXX] STARTED TO BLINK THE CHECK ENGINE LIGHT AND IT WAS FOLLOW BY THE ENGINE SHAKING AND NOT TAKING GEARS UP THEREFORE VERY SLOWLY ACCELERATING UP TO THE 40MPH. SEEING ALL THIS I DECIDED TO HEAD TO THE DEALERSHIP BIG HORN IN GLEN
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 25 reports (13%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Watch for engine shaking or a check-engine light.

issues.title: Fuel System
issues.blurb: 24 reports (12%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Several mention an NHTSA fuel-system recall and repair-part delays.
